message: WMI-4 arbitrary access (copy-references-field): the access extent/source/dest is loaded from struct field '(unnamed class/struct/union).sig' — the attacker-shaped WMI-3 content followed into an arbitrary memory access. [mechanism:copy-references-field;indicates=WMI-4] [mem:struct=(unnamed class/struct/union);field=sig;offset=0] [oracle:assert=sig governs a bounded, trusted referenced operand;assume=access extent/source/dest loaded from the field]
